eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Douglas; Lyon; Storey; Carson City, NV; at 9:00 AM on SEP 4, 2019 Effective until 9:15 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Lyon County authorities have issued a required weekly test for Douglas, Carson City, Lyon, Storey and Alpine Counties.  This is only a test. No action required
